objects.query: SELECT Name, DeveloperName, Subject, HtmlValue, UiType FROM EmailTemplate WHERE Name LIKE 'RLM%'
SELECT Name, Type FROM Group WHERE Type = 'Regular' AND Name IN ('Director', 'Manager', 'VP') ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Username, UserRole.DeveloperName FROM User WHERE UserRole.DeveloperName = 'CEO' AND IsActive = true ORDER BY Username ASC
SELECT Group.Name, Group.Type, UserOrGroupId$User.Username FROM GroupMember ORDER BY Group.Name ASC, UserOrGroupId$User.Username ASC
SELECT Name, ApprovalFlowApiName, ApprovalStepApiName, NotificationReason, EmailTemplate.Name FROM ApprovalAlertContentDef
